Node Definition

{
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "description": "Unique node identifier",
      "title": "Id",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "label": {
      "description": "Display text from the diagram",
      "title": "Label",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "element_type": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ElementType",
      "description": "Type of diagram element"
    },
    "phase": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/Phase"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Pipeline phase this node belongs to"
    },
    "shape": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Visual shape: rectangle, cylinder, circle, group_rectangle",
      "title": "Shape"
    },
    "color": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Fill color: blue, green, yellow, orange, gray",
      "title": "Color"
    },
    "bq_function": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Associated BigQuery ML function (e.g., ML.FORECAST)",
      "title": "Bq Function"
    },
    "description": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Additional context about this node",
      "title": "Description"
    },
    "bounding_box": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "items": {
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "type": "array"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "Region coordinates [y_min, x_min, y_max, x_max] normalized 0-1000. Accepts {top, left, bottom, right} dict format.",
      "title": "Bounding Box"
    },
    "parent_id": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "description": "ID of the parent group node (for nesting)",
      "title": "Parent Id"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "id",
    "label",
    "element_type"
  ],
  "title": "FlowchartNode",
  "type": "object"
}

      "description": "Arrow style: flow (solid) or feedback (dashed)"

  "title": "FlowchartEdge",
  "type": "object"

Full Schema
{
  "$defs": {
    "EdgeType": {
      "description": "Types of connections in the diagram.",
      "enum": [
        "flow",
        "feedback"
      ],
      "title": "EdgeType",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "ElementType": {
      "description": "Types of elements found in the BQ ARIMA pipeline diagram.",
      "enum": [
        "input",
        "process",
        "intermediate",
        "component",
        "output",
        "operator",
        "group"
      ],
      "title": "ElementType",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "FlowchartEdge": {
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "description": "Unique edge identifier",
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source": {
          "description": "Source node id",
          "title": "Source",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "target": {
          "description": "Target node id",
          "title": "Target",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "label": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Edge label (e.g., 'Point Forecast')",
          "title": "Label"
        },
        "edge_type": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/EdgeType",
          "default": "flow",
          "description": "Arrow style: flow (solid) or feedback (dashed)"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "source",
        "target"
      ],
      "title": "FlowchartEdge",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "FlowchartNode": {
      "properties": {
        "id": {
          "description": "Unique node identifier",
          "title": "Id",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "label": {
          "description": "Display text from the diagram",
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "element_type": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/ElementType",
          "description": "Type of diagram element"
        },
        "phase": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/Phase"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Pipeline phase this node belongs to"
        },
        "shape": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Visual shape: rectangle, cylinder, circle, group_rectangle",
          "title": "Shape"
        },
        "color": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Fill color: blue, green, yellow, orange, gray",
          "title": "Color"
        },
        "bq_function": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Associated BigQuery ML function (e.g., ML.FORECAST)",
          "title": "Bq Function"
        },
        "description": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Additional context about this node",
          "title": "Description"
        },
        "bounding_box": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "items": {
                "type": "integer"
              },
              "type": "array"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Region coordinates [y_min, x_min, y_max, x_max] normalized 0-1000. Accepts {top, left, bottom, right} dict format.",
          "title": "Bounding Box"
        },
        "parent_id": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "description": "ID of the parent group node (for nesting)",
          "title": "Parent Id"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "id",
        "label",
        "element_type"
      ],
      "title": "FlowchartNode",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "Phase": {
      "description": "Pipeline phases shown as labeled sections in the diagram.",
      "enum": [
        "Preprocessing",
        "Modeling",
        "Decomposed Time Series",
        "Output"
      ],
      "title": "Phase",
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "diagram_type": {
      "description": "Type of diagram",
      "title": "Diagram Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "nodes": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/FlowchartNode"
      },
      "title": "Nodes",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "edges": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/FlowchartEdge"
      },
      "title": "Edges",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "metadata": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "additionalProperties": true,
          "type": "object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Metadata"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "diagram_type",
    "nodes",
    "edges"
  ],
  "title": "FlowchartGraph",
  "type": "object"
}

Generated Description

This diagram is a detailed flowchart representing a machine learning pipeline for time series forecasting, decomposition, and anomaly detection. Specifically, based on the blue function labels on the right (such as `ML.FORECAST` and `ML.DETECT_ANOMALIES`), it illustrates the internal architecture of the distributed auto.ARIMA modeling process within Google Cloud's BigQuery ML.

Visually and logically, the diagram is structured into three main vertical sections enclosed by dashed lines: "Preprocessing," "Modeling," and "Decomposed Time Series." Data flows generally from left to right, starting with raw inputs on the far left, passing through the sequential phases, and resulting in final modeled outputs and evaluation metrics on the right.

The pipeline begins with two primary data inputs represented as cylinders: an "Input Time Series" and an optional "Input Custom Holiday" data store. The "Input Time Series" flows directly into the "Preprocessing" section. Here, the data undergoes a linear sequence of four data-cleaning operations, represented by light-blue rectangular nodes: "Duplicated Timestamp Handling," "Data Frequency Inference," "Irregular Timestamp Handling," and finally "Missing Data Interpolation."

Once preprocessed, the cleaned time series data enters the central "Modeling" section. This section operates as an iterative decomposition pipeline, where various signals are systematically extracted from the time series. At each step in this phase, a specific process (rectangular node) extracts a specific signal, sends that signal to the "Decomposed Time Series" block, and passes the remaining, modified time series (grey cylinders) to the next step.

The sequence in the Modeling phase unfolds as follows: First, the preprocessed data and the "Input Custom Holiday" data are fed into the "Holiday Adjustment" process. This extracts the "Holiday Component" and passes a "De-holiday'ed Time Series" to the next stage. Second, "Spikes & Dips Outlier Cleaning" processes this data, extracting an "Outlier Component" and yielding a "De-outlier'ed Time Series." Third, "Seasonal & Trend Decomposition (STL)" takes over, extracting "Multiple Seasonal Components" and passing along a "De-seasoned Time Series." Fourth, a "Step Change Adjustment" isolates a "Step Change Component" and outputs a "Step-change Adjusted Time Series." Finally, this adjusted series enters the "Trend Modeling (distributed auto.ARIMA)" step. This final process extracts the "Trend Component," leaves behind a final "Residual Time Series," and also outputs data to a purple cylinder representing "Evaluation Metrics + Model Coefficients" (associated with `ML.ARIMA_EVALUATE` and `ML.ARIMA_COEFFICIENTS`).

The "Decomposed Time Series" section acts as a repository for the isolated signals extracted during the Modeling phase: the Holiday, Outlier, Multiple Seasonal, Step Change, and Trend components.

The final phase of the diagram demonstrates how these decomposed components are utilized to generate the ultimate machine learning outputs. There are three primary output paths shown on the right side: 1. **Forecasting (`ML.FORECAST`)**: Data flows labeled "Point Forecast" from the Holiday, Multiple Seasonal, and Trend components converge into an "Aggregation" node (marked with a summation symbol). The output of this aggregation is the "Forecasted Time Series + Intervals." 2. **Explainability (`ML.EXPLAIN_FORECAST`)**: All five extracted components from the Decomposed Time Series block flow directly into a stacked data store labeled "Seasonal, Trend, Holiday, Outlier, Step Change Components," allowing users to see the individual factors influencing the model. 3. **Anomaly Detection (`ML.DETECT_ANOMALIES`)**: A flow labeled "Point Forecast + Intervals" originates from the Trend component and feeds into a final data store labeled "Fitted History Series + Forecasted Series + Intervals," which is used to identify historical and future anomalies.
